verdict.answer_first: B states the problem immediately: "The decrement. `i--` makes `i` go down"; A also answers first with "`i--` decrements the counter".
verdict.decisiveness: Both commit to the same fix; B says "Change it to `i++`" and A says "Change `i--` to `i++`".
verdict.actionability: B is slightly faster to act on: it identifies "The decrement" and gives the exact replacement `i++` with minimal extra text.
